libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Use current Pekko classic actor APIs from org.apache.pekko.actor, such as ActorSystem, Actor, AbstractActor, Props, dispatcher/scheduler/config/serialization utilities, and avoid APIs no longer present in 2.0.0-M1 such as org.apache.pekko.actor.TypedActor, TypedActorExtension, TypedProps, and org.apache.pekko.japi.Creator.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8742 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Existing 1.1.5 tests cover removed/deprecated APIs and will need test-code changes for 2.0.0-M1.
pekko-actor_2.13 2.0.0-M1 depends on scala-library 2.13.18 and com.typesafe:config 1.4.5; generated Scala tests should avoid assuming older removed APIs even if older tests compiled against 1.1.5.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is needed; the observed failure is from tests using APIs removed from pekko-actor_2.13 2.0.0-M1, not from missing setup.
